metadata.note: XPath fields are approximations — must verify on live app before final version

bugs.desc_en: Admin can create a flight with a departure time in the past

assertion.description: Flight with past departure time is created successfully (system does not block it)

bugs.desc_en: Admin can create a flight with a negative base price

assertion.description: Flight with negative Base Price is created successfully (system does not block it)

bugs.desc_en: Admin can create a new flight using an aircraft already assigned to another flight at the same or overlapping time

assertion.description: Flight using already-assigned aircraft (AB_A350) is created without conflict warning

actions.value_constraint: datetime overlaps with existing AB_A350 flight schedule

bugs.desc_en: Admin deletes an aircraft but it remains visible on the UI until the page is manually reloaded

assertion.description: After clicking Delete and confirming OK, BOE-777 still appears in the aircraft list without page reload

bugs.desc_en: Admin can create a new aircraft with a total number of seats equal to 0

assertion.description: Aircraft with Economy Seats=0 and Business Seats=0 is created successfully (no validation error)

bugs.desc_en: Creating a new flight using an aircraft with total seats equal to 0 results in a blank page

assertion.description: Manage Flights page goes blank after creating a flight that uses an aircraft with 0 seats

bugs.desc_en: Creating a new aircraft with an excessively long Aircraft Code breaks the UI layout, causing the '+ New Aircraft' button to overflow outside the screen

assertion.description: After saving aircraft with very long code, the Manage Aircrafts page layout is broken — '+ New Aircraft' button overflows off-screen

bugs.desc_en: After creating an aircraft with an excessively long Aircraft Code, creating a new flight using that aircraft breaks the UI layout on Manage Flights page

assertion.description: Manage Flights page layout is broken — Class Info and Action columns overflow off-screen after flight uses the long-code aircraft

actions.value_constraint: exact: the long-code aircraft created in steps 2-8

bugs.desc_en: Deleting an airport that is assigned to a scheduled flight causes the Manage Flights page to display a blank screen

assertion.description: Manage Flights page is completely blank after deleting Da Nang airport (which is used in a scheduled flight)

bugs.desc_en: Users can access flight information on the Admin page by directly navigating to /admin/flights URL

assertion.description: Non-admin user can view admin flight data by navigating directly to /admin/flights — no authentication redirect

bugs.desc_en: Search information entered on the Book Flight page is lost after navigating to another page and returning

assertion.description: After selecting From/To on Book Flight, navigating away, and returning — the selections are gone

bugs.desc_en: The ticket prices for Economy and Business classes are the same when searching for a flight

assertion.description: Search results show identical price for Economy and Business class seats on the same flight

bugs.desc_en: The system allows users to enter a future date of birth when filling in passenger information

assertion.description: Future DOB (2026-03-02) is accepted and user can proceed to next booking step without error

bugs.desc_en: The passport image is lost when the user navigates back to view the selected seats and then returns to Traveller Details

assertion.description: After uploading passport image and navigating back then forward, the uploaded image field is empty

bugs.desc_en: On the Current Bookings page, using the browser Back button does not close the cancellation confirmation popup

assertion.description: After clicking Cancel and browser Back, the confirmation popup remains visible on the page

bugs.desc_en: On the Manage Bookings page, filtering bookings for user 'btcong' shows Results = 2 even though only one booking exists

assertion.description: Search results count shows 2 but only 1 booking exists for user 'btcong'

bugs.desc_en: On the Manage Bookings page, filtering bookings for user 'Btcong' (capitalized) returns no results, although the search should be case-insensitive

assertion.description: Search for 'Btcong' (capital B) returns 0 results — system is case-sensitive when it should not be

bugs.desc_en: The sorting functionality on the Product page is not working (Price high to low has no effect)

assertion.description: After selecting 'Price (high to low)', product order does not change

bugs.desc_en: Clicking Finish to complete payment has no effect

assertion.description: Clicking Finish button on checkout overview does nothing — no order confirmation, no redirect

bugs.desc_en: Cart icon is not properly aligned with other header elements, affecting layout consistency (visual_user)

assertion.description: After logging in as visual_user, the cart icon in the header is misaligned compared to normal users
